name: hugging_face_tgi
explanation: Hugging Face Text Generation Inference exposes Prometheus metrics on a single canonical `/metrics` path. The check is a thin subclass of `OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2` that maps a fixed metric/label dictionary; the only required field is the OpenMetrics endpoint URL. The spec example points at port 80, which matches the TGI default HTTP server port (configurable via `--port`). This is pattern A (OpenMetrics on a known port) - one URL, one path, no auth - so a generic openmetrics-port-scan against the typical TGI port set (80, 8080, 3000) covers the deployment shapes documented upstream.
notes: No auto_conf.yaml ships today, but the standard openmetrics_endpoint=http://%%host%%:80/metrics template would be sufficient. The TGI default port can be overridden by the operator, which is a minor caveat shared with most Prometheus-based integrations.
